ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert Perkiss, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chambers & Chambers Wine Merchants, a corporation.
No appearance by defendant Vinfolio, LLC a limited liability company dba Vinfolio.
Default was entered against defendant on April 19, 2010. Amended Default was entered on June 23, 2010.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Stephen J. Bachman was filed on June 23, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 23, 2010.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on June 28, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chambers & Chambers Wine Merchants, a corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Vinfolio, LLC, a limited liability company dba Vinfolio as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,204.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $495.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $26,699.00.

Judgement was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2010 Continued To Aug-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
